accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA reference is accurate context (chapter 8 of title 5 is the Congressional Review Act).

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Congressional Review Act label is correct context, not a hallucination.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves and nullifies the DOE walk-in coolers/freezers energy conservation standards rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the CRA mechanism and explains the rule is nullified and has no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: A simple CRA disapproval resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions.

effective_dates.why: Notes the resolution was approved on May 9, 2025, and the rule's December 23, 2024 publication date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval and nullification of the identified rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral, factual description with no editorializing.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Department of Energy, the Federal Register, and the Congressional Review Act.

correct_figures.why: Dates (December 23, 2024 publication and May 9, 2025 approval) match the bill text.
